reviews.text:
We worked with Andy to shoot our wedding at the rustic Eureka Lodge in Silverton, and could not have asked for a better experience! First off, the photos are amazing and exactly the style we were hoping for; he's very familiar with the area and the venue so could lead us to the most epic shots, with full coverage of the whole event.
Also we had a more laid back and flexible wedding with a lot of nontraditional choices, so we looked for vendors to match the vibe, and Andy was game to go along with just about anything and had some creative and fun ideas of his own too.
Not only that, the guy is such a fun time to be around, his presence and conversations were a highlight of the event for all the guests!
Thank you Andy for helping make it such an incredible day!

I can't rave enough about our experience with Andy! From start to finish, he was an absolute gem. His deep knowledge of the area made for all the difference, guiding us to the most stunning spots and ensuring that every shot was perfectly framed.

Not only was he incredibly skilled at capturing the essence of our intimate day, but he also made the entire process so much fun. He helped us feel at ease in front of the camera and guided us through posing, making what may have felt unnatural to look effortlessly beautiful.

The photos he took are nothing short of breathtaking, perfectly preserving the emotions and moments of our elopement! We couldn't have asked for a better photographer.

We arranged a photo shoot with Andy for our large family of 16 people (half of them being small children!) for our parent’s 50th wedding anniversary. From the very beginning Andy was incredible. We were from out of town, so he was able to help us choose a location as well as work us into his busy summer schedule. The day of the shoot we thought we were going to be in for a long morning of trying to get the kids to cooperate with a photographer who might struggle with our huge and diverse group (everyone was between the ages of 1.5 and 76, all with varying abilities yo walk and pay attention). But Andy was incredible at taking quick pictures, capturing all the moments of kids picking wildflowers and wild strawberries, and moving our group around so we got as much diversity in our pictures as we had in our group. Not only that, but he had all of our pictures to us in a matter of a couple days! Our entire group was seriously impressed with his professionalism, his skill, and his kindness and friendliness. If we had it to do all over again, we would pick Andy 110%! We HIGHLY recommend him for anyone looking for some great pictures in the Durango area!

Andy was above and beyond what we had expected of a photographer. He was kind and encouraging and worked with our arrangements. Everyone at our wedding commented about how amazing he was! The photos turned out fantastic and he captured exactly what I was looking for! 10/10 would recommend!!!

Andy did a great job with our winter engagement photos at Purgatory Flats Trail. He put us at ease and made the experience fun and stress free. We got a lot of photos, and they turned out beautiful! Can't wait to see what he does with the wedding.
